title: MENTAL HEALTH THERAPIES - 211info
text: NEUROTHERAPEUTIC PEDIATRIC THERAPIES NE PORTLAND MENTAL HEALTH THERAPIES Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides outpatient mental health treatment. Services include individual, couples, and family therapy, parent and family coaching, play therapy, foster and adoptive family therapy, and more. Option for telehealth available. 10130 NE Skidmore Street Portland, OR 97220 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Monday-Friday 9am-5pm; limited 8am and 5pm appointments may be available Email (503) 372-5147 6 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers (503) 257-3878 Main phone (503) 266-8632 FAX Main phone (503) 372-5147 ext 6 Care Coordinator Team Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call for appointment or visit website for information FEES: Accepts OHP and private insurance. Sliding scale fees available. Existing clients may request financial assistance for therapy costs. Scholarships are dependent on fund availability. DOCUMENTS: Insurance information, if applicable. Proof of income if applying for sliding scale fees. LANGUAGES: English, Spanish, interpretation by arrangement AREA SERVED: Multnomah County SITE HOURS: Monday-Friday 9am-5pm TRAVEL/LOCATION INFORMATION: On TriMet bus line Services: Adolescent/Youth Counseling Conjoint Counseling Family Counseling Individual Counseling Other Services Offered At This Location: MENTAL HEALTH ASSESSMENT AND TREATMENT - PARENT CHILD INTERACTION THERAPY REHABILITATION/HABILITATION SERVICES - OCCUPATIONAL AND PHYSICAL THERAPY REHABILITATION/HABILITATION SERVICES - SPEECH THERAPY If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service.
